_description: Rules for reactive XUI data binding using _data_source and _on_data.
_core_rules: _data_source automatically subscribes the XUIObject to XData updates.
Use _on_data to react to incoming data updates.
_on_data executes data-only nano commands through XObject.onData().
_data_source binding calls XObject.onData(...), which may execute _on_data, _on.data, or _once.data handlers.
Do NOT generate React/Vue/Angular binding syntax.
Do NOT generate manual polling loops.
Do NOT generate addEventListener for data updates.
Do NOT generate direct _xd.on calls inside views.
Use nano commands to transform or render incoming data.
Objects and arrays should typically use set-text-from-data for text rendering.
_priority_rules: _data_source must be a string XData key.
Use _type:"textarea" for textarea controls. Do NOT emulate textarea with input/type attributes.
Textarea sizing should be inside the style string.
Do NOT generate width or min-height as standalone fields.
When rendering XData into visible text, prefer set-text-from-data over set-text.
If incoming data may be an object or array, always include _on_data with set-text-from-data.

_fields._data_source: String XData key to subscribe to.
_fields._on_data: Data-only nano command, module command, or sequence executed when data changes.
_fields._process_data: Optional boolean. Enables or disables data processing.

_nano_commands._description: Render incoming data into object text.
Set explicit text. Not preferred for reactive data unless text is already provided.

_patterns._description: Render simple text value into label.
Consume and clear transient XData after render.

_anti_patterns._reason: _bind.xdata is not canonical Xpell binding syntax. Use _data_source.
When incoming data may be an object or array, include _on_data with set-text-from-data.
set-text expects explicit text params. Use set-text-from-data for reactive data rendering.

_notes: This skill depends on xui-core and xpell-core behavior.
_data_source binds through XObject/XUIObject lifecycle, not manual event listeners.
Use style string for DOM styling fields such as width and min-height.
